overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character ascending concrete stairs through a futuristic urban environment at night. The scene features neon-lit holograms, towering skyscrapers with holographic advertisements, and transitions from narrow passages to open city overlooks before ending in overgrown vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairway ascending between high retaining walls

events.description: exits narrow stairwell into slightly more open area with visible palm trees and distant city lights

agents.ego_description: walking steadily up concrete stairs flanked by stone walls, heading toward an opening with palm trees visible above

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs ascending between high walls
tall concrete walls flanking the stairway on both sides
tall palm trees silhouetted against the night sky at the top of the stairs
faint glow of neon lights from the city visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow concrete stairwell ascending through an urban canyon. The camera moves steadily upward between high stone walls, transitioning from an enclosed space to a more open area where palm trees and the distant glow of a futuristic city become visible against the night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under concrete overpass with neon holographic installation

events.description: turns right and enters covered area beneath a concrete bridge overpass
approaching cyan holographic figure illuminates the surroundings with teal light

agents.ego_description: walking toward a glowing cyan holographic figure under the bridge, navigating around rubble

entered.detail: large concrete bridge structure overhead with support columns
glowing cyan holographic skeleton with crossed arms and TERMINUS text
debris and broken concrete scattered along the path

segments.scene_description: The character turns right into a covered walkway beneath a concrete overpass. The environment shifts to artificial lighting as a striking cyan holographic figure of a skeleton becomes visible ahead, casting an eerie glow on the rubble-strewn ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: rubble-strewn overlook with holographic art and city skyline view

events.description: passes hologram and emerges onto open overlook revealing the city skyline

agents.ego_description: examining the holographic figure up close before moving past it to reveal the cityscape

entered.detail: massive holographic advertisement showing a woman's face on a distant building
towering futuristic buildings with illuminated windows and neon accents
industrial cranes silhouetted against the night sky between buildings

segments.scene_description: Moving past the holographic installation, the scene opens to a breathtaking city overlook. The camera reveals towering skyscrapers adorned with massive holographic billboards and construction cranes, while the cyan hologram remains visible to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated city overlook with panoramic skyline views

events.description: turns away from city view and begins ascending final concrete stairway

agents.ego_description: panning across the cityscape to take in the holographic billboards and skyline before turning to continue the ascent

entered.detail: second set of concrete stairs leading upward to the right

segments.scene_description: The character pauses to survey the sprawling cyberpunk cityscape with its towering holographic advertisements and industrial cranes. After taking in the view, the camera turns and begins ascending a final set of concrete stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown urban path with burning barrel and NPC gathering

events.description: encounters two NPCs standing near a burning barrel at the top of the stairs
passing the fire barrel, the primary illumination shifts to warm firelight before entering darkness

agents.ego_description: climbing the final stairs and passing two NPCs gathered around a burning fire barrel

notable_agents.action: two figures standing near a burning barrel at the top of the stairs

entered.detail: metal barrel with bright orange flames providing warm light
two human figures standing near the fire
tall grass and bushes encroaching on the concrete path

segments.scene_description: Ascending the final stairway, the character encounters two NPCs standing near a burning barrel that casts flickering orange light on the surroundings. The environment becomes increasingly overgrown with vegetation as the camera moves past the fire and into dense darkness.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous ascent from a narrow urban canyon into a sprawling cyberpunk cityscape that eventually fades into overgrown darkness. It begins by climbing a concrete stairwell between high stone walls, moving steadily upward until the enclosed space opens to reveal palm trees and the distant glow of a futuristic city. As the camera turns right into a covered walkway beneath an overpass, the lighting shifts to an eerie cyan glow cast by a holographic skeleton standing amidst rubble. The scene then expands into a breathtaking overlook of towering skyscrapers and massive holographic billboards before the camera turns to climb a final set of stairs. Finally, the view shifts from the neon skyline to the flickering orange light of a burning barrel and two NPCs, as the environment becomes increasingly overgrown with vegetation and disappears into dense darkness.
